---
title: "Quarto 2"
author: "Avinesh Saravana"
format: html
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(tidyverse))
```

```{r}
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 5
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| echo: false
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(tidyverse))

mpg %>%
  drop_na(displ, hwy, class, drv) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = displ, y = hwy, color = class, shape = drv)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.08, height = 0.5, size = 2.5, alpha = 0.85) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE, color = "gray20", size = 0.8) +
  facet_wrap(~ drv) +
  scale_color_viridis_d(option = "C") +
  labs(
    title = "Engine Displacement vs Highway MPG",
    subtitle = "Colored by vehicle class; shaped by drivetrain (f = front, r = rear, 4 = 4wd)",
    x = "Engine displacement (liters)",
    y = "Highway miles per gallon",
    color = "Class",
    shape = "Drive"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 18),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12, margin = margin(b = 8)),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
```
